# GitHub Directory Guidance

Repository-wide agent governance lives in [`../AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md) — read it in full, not summarized or partially, before making any change under `.github/**`.

Follow the root guidance for all `.github/**` changes too — in particular rules 4 (issue/PR linking), 33 (workflow validation), 47 (secret/variable handling), 50, and 51 — read them there; this file does not restate their content, so there is nothing here that can drift out of sync with them.
